10.2.0.NOTE: That each modelVersion has a corresponding fixture file, which defines the previous and current versions.
10.2.0.NOTE2: These fixtures define the before and after state, and are used for both upgrade and rollback testing.
10.2.0.HINT: You can use the template below and create sample objects for 10.2.0 and 10.3.0 versions.
10.2.0.HINT2: Alternatively, you can copy the contents from older fixture files (if they exist) and adapt them accordingly.
10.2.0.IMPORTANT: The current version fixtures (below) are defining how objects from the previous version fixtures (this array) would look like AFTER upgrading.
10.2.0.IMPORTANT2: They are NOT defining random sample objects with properties that are valid for the current model version.
